title: DAL ToolBox Package
text: goal DAL Toolbox provide series data analytics functions organized framework. supports data preprocessing, classification, regression, clustering, time series prediction functions.

title: DAL ToolBox Package
text: can install development version DAL Toolbox GitHub :
code: # install.packages("devtools") devtools::install_github("cefet-rj-dal/daltoolbox", force=TRUE, dependencies=FALSE, upgrade="never", build_vignettes = TRUE)

title: Partition Around Medoids (PAM) Clustering — cluster_pam
text: Implements Partition Around Medoids (PAM) clustering algorithm. PAM partitioning clustering method seeks minimize sum dissimilarities data points medoid assigned cluster. Unlike k-means, PAM can handle categorical data well distance measures Euclidean distance.

title: Partition Around Medoids (PAM) Clustering — cluster_pam

title: Partition Around Medoids (PAM) Clustering — cluster_pam

title: Partition Around Medoids (PAM) Clustering — cluster_pam
text: algorithm selects k medoids (representative points) data set, assigns data point closest medoid. tries improve solution swapping medoid non-medoid point computing total dissimilarity new configuration. total dissimilarity reduced swap, solution updated; otherwise, swap rejected.

title: Fit — fit_curvature
text: R, fit function generic function used fit model data set. fundamental function many machine learning algorithms statistical models. fit function takes data set model specification input returns object containing fitted model parameters relevant information

title: Fit — fit_curvature

title: fit_curvature_max — fit_curvature_max
text: function creates object fitting curvature function uses maximum curvature value. resulting object can used transform data set using max curvature value.

title: fit_curvature_max — fit_curvature_max
text: Returns object class fit_curvature_max, inherits fit_curvature dal_transform classes. object contains list following elements: func: function used calculate curvature, set max. curvature: maximum curvature value calculated fitting process.

title: fit_curvature_max — fit_curvature_max
text: fit_curvature_max function extension fit_curvature function, creates object fitting curvature function based specified input function. fit_curvature_max function sets input function max, resulting curvature function calculates maximum curvature value. resulting object can used transform data set scaling data according maximum curvature value, using transform method.

title: fit_curvature_min — fit_curvature_min
text: function fit_curvature_min() fits curvature function dataset, returns list object results. function similar fit_curvature(), selects minimum value curvature function optimal cut point.

title: Smoothing — smoothing
text: Smoothing statistical technique used reduce noise signal dataset removing high-frequency components. involves applying smoothing function algorithm dataset results smoother curve easier analyze. smoothing technique can applied type data, including time-series data, images, sound signals.

title: Smoothing — smoothing
text: process smoothing involves replacing data point average weighted average neighboring points. several smoothing algorithms can used, depending characteristics data. common smoothing techniques include moving average smoothing, Gaussian smoothing, Savitzky-Golay smoothing, exponential smoothing. syntax smoothing function follows: x: numeric vector time series data needs smoothed. window_size: integer value representing size window.

title: Smoothing by cluster — smoothing_cluster
text: function smoothing_cluster() used perform smoothing data cluster. function takes input numeric vector, divided clusters using k-means algorithm. mean cluster calculated used smoothed value observations within cluster.

title: Smoothing by cluster — smoothing_cluster
text: arguments function: x: numeric vector values smoothed; k: number clusters use k-means algorithm.

title: Smoothing by evaluation — smoothing_evaluation
text: smoothing_evaluation() function performs smoothing evaluation using cross-validation. calculates mean squared error (MSE) smoothing parameter returns data frame results. function uses smoothing technique specified user smooth data.

title: Smoothing by evaluation — smoothing_evaluation
text: arguments function: data: data frame containing dataset smoothed; target: string indicating target variable; method: string indicating smoothing method used ("smoothing interval", "smoothing freq", "smoothing cluster"); parameters: vector containing parameters used smoothing method. number parameters depend chosen method; k: integer indicating number folds used cross-validation.

title: Smoothing by Freq — smoothing_freq
text: 'smoothing_freq' function used smooth given time series data aggregating observations within fixed frequency.

title: Smoothing by Freq — smoothing_freq
text: function takes three arguments: ts_data: time series object smoothed. frequency: frequency aggregate observations (e.g., "day", "week", "month"). method: method used calculate smoothed values (e.g., "mean", "median", "max", "min").

title: Smoothing by interval — smoothing_inter

title: Smoothing by interval — smoothing_inter
text: function takes three arguments: data: numeric vector time series data smoothed. window_size: integer value specifying size moving window. odd number ensure centered window. method: character string specifying smoothing method used. can one "simple", "linear", "exponential", "spline", "kernel", "loess".

title: Z-score Normalization — zscore
text: zscore() function DAL package performs normalization input data feature (column) zero mean standard deviation nsd. Normalizing data common preprocessing step machine learning, particularly using algorithms sensitive scale input features. resulting zscore normalized object returned "zscore" class added .

title: Z-score Normalization — zscore
